# resources

Extracts `defineResource()` definitions from each plugin's `server/` and
`central/` directories. No `relate()` — resources have no cross-plugin
relationships.

Resources span two runtimes, so facet data is `{ server: ResourceDef[],
central: ResourceDef[] }`.
